honesty_note: invoice_sent_count and invoice_paid_count remain 0 until the founder actually sends and Moyasar confirms payment. Marker files NEVER lie about market state.
next_required_action: Once a qualified buyer accepts the proposal, follow docs/ops/FIRST_INVOICE_UNLOCK.md exactly. Capital Asset registration FIRST (non-negotiable #11).
completion_rule: Score 5 on First Invoice Motion requires at least one invoice entry with sent_at + proof_target.

entry_schema.proof_target: string (the specific Proof Pack KPI commitment)
